'''âd-r-d-s''' ('''kadardesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:forbode|forbode]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-r-d-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:forbode|forbode]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-r-d-s
|-
! Lemma
| kadardesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidardesoko|thidardesoko]] || [[word:jidardesoko|jidardesoko]] || [[word:shidardesoko|shidardesoko]] || [[word:kidardesoko|kidardesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudardesoko|thuthudardesoko]] || [[word:jujudardesoko|jujudardesoko]] || [[word:shushudardesoko|shushudardesoko]] || [[word:kukudardesoko|kukudardesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodardesoko|thodardesoko]] || [[word:jodardesoko|jodardesoko]] || [[word:shodardesoko|shodardesoko]] || [[word:kodardesoko|kodardesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdardesoko|thĂŠdardesoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdardesoko|jĂŠdardesoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdardesoko|shĂŠdardesoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdardesoko|kĂŠdardesoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadardesoko|thadardesoko]] || [[word:jadardesoko|jadardesoko]] || [[word:shadardesoko|shadardesoko]] || [[word:kadardesoko|kadardesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadardesoko|thadardesoko]] || [[word:jadardesoko|jadardesoko]] || [[word:shadardesoko|shadardesoko]] || [[word:kadardesoko|kadardesoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
